docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMIN, G. S. AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MONA STROTHER, WILLIAM DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, MONA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 226 6TH STREET #23, STAYED UNTIL NOV-07-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:00PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDED JDMT FOR MONEY. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
